aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The cosmos are quiet, but your CI pipeline is not.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today. Your Slack is not. Your Slack is never quiet.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — Taurus energy demands stability. Stability demands zero deploys.
taurus.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today. You were not planning to change anything anyway. The universe finally agrees with you.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — You will open the deploy pipeline three times and close it four.
gemini.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today. Your browser has 47 tabs open. The cosmos have simply given up.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — The stars are quiet. Prod should be too.
cancer.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today. You felt something was wrong with the build before it ran. You were right. You're always right.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — Leo demands an audience. Your deploy notification is the closest you'll get.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today. You will still request a review from the entire team. For a one-line change.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: No — You found a bug in the deploy script. You always find a bug in the deploy script.
virgo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today. You will spend the quiet writing 400 lines of unit tests for a function that returns true.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — You've been deciding since yesterday. The window is closing.
libra.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today. You have weighed both options equally. You will schedule a third meeting to decide.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — You already know something will go wrong. Trust that instinct.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today. You have been watching the logs for two hours. The logs have nothing to say. You don't believe the logs.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — You'll push to prod before realizing the branch wasn't updated. Classic.
sagittarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today. You are not. You have already merged three times before standup.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — You made a plan. You checked the plan. You are executing the plan.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today. You have already updated your Jira board, your OKRs, and your five-year roadmap. It is 9:04 AM.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — You are deploying a feature nobody asked for. As a treat.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today. You have rewritten authentication in a language the team does not know. You call it a proof of concept.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — You have been staring at the PR for 40 minutes. The code is fine. You are not sure.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today. You have read the same line of code twelve times. It is fine. You will read it again.
